alpha.desc: The property consists of a primary structure situated within a developed site containing paved vehicle circulation and parking areas|Multiple access routes connect the property to surrounding roadways|Additional structures, landscaped sections, and developed features are visible throughout the surrounding area.

bravo.desc: The view shows the primary structure surrounded by paved circulation areas and adjacent parking spaces|Vehicle access is provided by multiple driveways connecting to surrounding roadways|Additional developed features and nearby structures are visible around the property perimeter.

charlie.desc: The view shows the primary structure positioned within a developed area containing paved parking and vehicle circulation routes|Multiple access points connect the site to surrounding roadways|Additional structures and developed site features are visible adjacent to the prope

delta.desc: The view shows the primary structure bordered by paved circulation areas and parking spaces on multiple sides|Driveways connect the site to surrounding roadways and neighboring developed areas|Additional structures, landscaped sections, and site features are visible throughout the surrounding property.
